title: Dr. Stone Mod
description: this mod adds multiple items and blocks based on the anime/Manga Dr. Stone
body:
this is my fist mod i have made based on the Anime Dr. Stone
in this mod adds multiple items and blocks from the Anime/Manga 


in the latest version there are

8 new Weapons
3 new food items
18 new blocks
39 new items
1 new music disc
2 new ore
3 new structures

and 1000% of fun


Can you survive in the stone world and bring back civilisation?
get exited!

for basic crafting recipe's check my mod showcase
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HRdBjoy4jcs (outdated) 
Trailer 
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jCL5Srv7auk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jCL5Srv7auk)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
I am not associated with Riichiro Inagaki, or the Dr. Stone Franchise in any way

</details>
